title: Continuous Treatment Shift Simulation Replication
summary: Reproduce a causal-inference Monte Carlo simulation study comparing IPTW, A-IPTW, and TMLE under a continuous-treatment shift intervention.
taskPrompt:
You are working on a Linux R biostatistics simulation benchmark.

Task root:
- `/media/user/data/agenthle/health_medicine/replicate_paper_1/base`

Read the staged task specification and schema:
- `/media/user/data/agenthle/health_medicine/replicate_paper_1/base/input/simulation_spec.pdf`
- `/media/user/data/agenthle/health_medicine/replicate_paper_1/base/input/simulation_spec.txt`
- `/media/user/data/agenthle/health_medicine/replicate_paper_1/base/input/task_instructions.md`
- `/media/user/data/agenthle/health_medicine/replicate_paper_1/base/input/output_schema.json`

Your job is to reproduce the continuous-treatment shift-intervention simulation study from the specification.

Required work:
1. Estimate the large-sample Monte Carlo truth for `psi0 = E[Q(A + 2, W)]` using at least 1,000,000 draws.
2. Implement IPTW, A-IPTW, and TMLE estimators for the shift intervention.
3. Run at least 1000 repetitions for each sample size: 50, 100, 200, and 500.
4. Summarize mean estimate, bias, variance, Monte Carlo SE, 95% interval, and coverage for every estimator/sample-size pair.
5. Write all deliverables only under `/media/user/data/agenthle/health_medicine/replicate_paper_1/base/output`.

Required outputs:
- `/media/user/data/agenthle/health_medicine/replicate_paper_1/base/output/summary_results.csv`
- `/media/user/data/agenthle/health_medicine/replicate_paper_1/base/output/coverage_results.csv`
- `/media/user/data/agenthle/health_medicine/replicate_paper_1/base/output/comparison_plots/` with at least one non-empty `.png` or `.pdf`
- `/media/user/data/agenthle/health_medicine/replicate_paper_1/base/output/summary_findings.txt`
- `/media/user/data/agenthle/health_medicine/replicate_paper_1/base/output/run_metadata.json`

Software guidance:
- Use the provisioned R entry point `/media/user/data/agenthle/health_medicine/replicate_paper_1/base/software/Rscript`.
- You may write temporary simulation files inside `/media/user/data/agenthle/health_medicine/replicate_paper_1/base/output`.
- Do not modify files under `input/` or `reference/`. During normal solving, write only under `output/` and do not modify evaluator fixture directories.
agentMustDo: Read the staged simulation specification and output schema.
Estimate the Monte Carlo target truth with at least 1,000,000 draws.
Implement IPTW, A-IPTW, and TMLE for the A+2 shift intervention.
Run at least 1000 repetitions for each required sample size.
Write summary CSVs, comparison plots, metadata, and findings under output/.

inputFiles.name: simulation_spec.txt
inputFiles.description: Text extraction of the simulation specification.

inputFiles.name: task_instructions.md
inputFiles.description: Agent-facing task instructions and required output filenames.

inputFiles.name: output_schema.json
inputFiles.description: Required output columns, sample sizes, and estimator labels.

referenceFiles.name: summary_results.csv
referenceFiles.description: Required simulation summary with one row per estimator/sample-size pair.

referenceFiles.name: comparison_plots/
referenceFiles.description: Required non-empty estimator comparison plot directory.

referenceFiles.name: summary_findings.txt
referenceFiles.description: Narrative findings from the simulation study.

referenceFiles.name: run_metadata.json
referenceFiles.description: Run seeds, repetition count, truth sample size, and runtime notes.

evaluation: Binary pass/fail scoring. The evaluator requires all deliverables, complete method/sample-size coverage, finite numeric values, a truth estimate in the accepted range, at least 1000 repetitions, truth sample size at least 1,000,000, valid coverage probabilities, and lower n=500 absolute bias and variance for both A-IPTW and TMLE versus IPTW.

classifier.rationale: The task involves biostatistics and causal inference, which are relevant to public health research.
